added.title: The Arrival
added.description: As the Workers' District faces extreme strain and Elu's political climate worsens, Iyanu intensifies her training with Mama Sewa while two formidable military forces converge on the Riverlands Settlement to capture her.

added.title: The Source Part I
added.description: As Cursed animals besiege Elu, Iyanu searches for The Source. Meanwhile, Biyi, Toye, Olori and Kanfo launch a counterattack against Chancellor Nuro and his forces, who are trying to prevent Iyanu from lifting the Curse on Yorubaland.

added.title: The Pink Painter Strikes Again
added.description: They're baaaaack! All 16 Campers from Season One return for more spills, thrills and dramaaaaa! And a very special guest arrives on the island to really mess things up. Hope everyone packed an extra pair of pants!

added.title: Taking it to the Rim Reaper
added.description: Things get wet, wild and gross when the Campers play waterslide basketball!

added.title: Launch Back of Notre Game
added.description: Catapult your team member into distant scoring zones to earn points but if you miss you'll be landing in a penalty zone filled with all kind of evil. The first team to reach 10,000 points wins. The losing team, as always, will be sending someone home.

added.title: Severe Eggs & Pains
added.description: Chris responds to the network's ask for a holiday special by making the campers hunt for eggs. With the teams now merged it's all about being the first one back with an egg and winning immunity. Well, and not getting gutted by a giant bird.

added.title: The Wheel of Vomit
added.description: Chef finally gets to show off his fancy culinary skills in an eating challenge where each dish is a tastebud's nightmare. The last camper still eating wins immunity. The rest are all up for elimination.

added.title: Paddle Field Earth
added.description: Today's challenge involves canoeing, hiking and mountain climbing. It's just like normal summer camp!! Except that you canoe over a waterfall, hike through a geyser field and climb a mountain that's actually the world's biggest beehive. It's nothing like summer camp.

added.title: The Truth, The Pole Truth and Nothing But the Truth
added.description: If spending the day balancing on a pole under the direct sun with no food in your tummy sounds like a fun time you are going to love today's challenge.

added.title: Tortoise Rigamortis
added.description: With just 5 campers remaining things are getting tense. So today is just about having fun taking selfies with wild animals. Everyone had their rabies shot?

added.title: Caved by the Bell
added.description: The final 4 get must wander through a dark and spooky cave hunting for coins. The challenge only gets worse when they discover that something is also hunting them.

added.title: Magma Cum Laude
added.description: This is it! Today one of the 3 remaining campers will become a millionaire. The only thing standing in their way is 2 other campers, a forest, some lava, some violent goats, a mountain, and vomit. Other than that, pretty easy.

added.title: Nom Nom's Entourage
added.description: Nom Nom recruits the Bears to act as his entourage of friends. But when the Bears realize Nom Nom doesn't understand friendship, they decide to kick their day of bonding into high gear.

added.title: Ranger Tabes
added.description: To recover a missing package, the Bears get help from Ranger Tabes, an eccentric forest ranger. But her overblown sense of justice might be too much for the Bears to handle.

added.title: Rooms
added.description: The Bears switch bedrooms for the night and get a glimpse of the living space of one of their brothers. But the deeper they go, hidden secrets are revealed.

added.title: Losing Ice
added.description: Feeling unappreciated, Ice Bear leaves his brothers to be the chef of a restaurant. Desperate to fill the void, Grizz and Panda look for Ice Bear's replacement.

added.title: Cellie
added.description: Fed up with sharing, Panda forbids his brothers from using his cellphone any longer. But when the brothers get their own super advanced smartphones, Panda starts to succumb to crippling jealousy.

added.title: Fashion Bears
added.description: In order to abide by the clothing policy of their favorite Boba shop, the Bears get some new outfits. But with new looks come new lives including office work, fashion modeling and even falling in love!

added.title: The Island
added.description: While trying to sail to Japan, the Baby Bears get stranded on an island. Luckily, they meet Dave and Karla, who help with survival on the island while looking for an escape.

added.title: Bear Flu
added.description: The Bears become terribly ill and Chloe takes it upon herself to take care of them. But things get tricky when word of the Bears' sickness goes viral.

added.title: Chicken and Waffles
added.description: Panda needs to meet his brothers at the most exclusive restaurant in town. But when he loses his contacts lenses and can't see, Panda needs Charlie's help to get him into the city.

added.title: The Audition
added.description: The Bears audition to be the next mascot for their favorite cereal. They get so caught up in the process that their competitiveness gets the best of them.

added.title: Barb and the Spotted Bears Chapter 1: A Barb is Born
added.description: On the third day of the world, Barb tries to save the ferns from being eaten by the spotted bears. But the bears are only getting hungrier and hungrier - will Barb be able to stop the ferns from going extinct?

added.title: Barb and the Spotted Bears Chapter 2: Hot Milk and Careless Whispers
added.description: Barb tries to soothe the spotted bears with a dreamy invention, but soon finds herself outnumbered. Will Barb be able to even the playing field - or will she become the bears' next snack?

added.title: Barb and the Spotted Bears Chapter 3: Nightcap
added.description: Barb and the elves band together to protect the source of all magic from a pair of fiendish intruders. But will Barb be able to outsmart two rascals as old as the world itself?

added.title: Betsy and Ghost Chapter 1: Burps 'n Sighs
added.description: On the eve of Ramona's exile to Frozen Time, Susie tries to get rid of the sad memory of their relationship, but soon finds herself haunted by the past.

added.title: Betsy and Ghost Chapter 2: Boo Jeans
added.description: It's Betsy's first night on Summer Camp Island, and she's looking forward to a cozy evening in with a nice cup of tea. But when Alice convinces her to participate in an initiation ritual, Betsy gets lost in the woods.
